title: lysimachia henryi var. henryi
intro: Lysimachia henryi var. henryi, also known as Henry's loosestrife or Henry's golden-axil, is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to the presence of iridoid glycosides and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Lysimachia henryi var. henryi include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant activity, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of Lysimachia henryi var. henryi can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
